example_prompt: Create or upsert a customer profile in Bictorys to associate with payments, subscriptions, or BNPL plans.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the customer. Example: "SN", "CI", "GN".

phone.description: Customer phone number in E.164 format (e.g. "+221770001234").

locale.description: Preferred locale for customer communications (e.g. "fr", "en"). Affects notification language.

id.description: Unique customer identifier. Use this UUID in create_subscription, create_bnpl, or create_payout.

gotchas: This endpoint uses the customer-management microservice. The base URL is https://api.bictorys.com/customer-management/v1 — not https://api.bictorys.com/pay/v1. Using the wrong base URL returns 404.

Pass the query parameter createOrUpdate=true to upsert: if a customer with the same phone or email already exists, it is updated rather than creating a duplicate. Without this flag, a duplicate conflict may be returned.

The customer id UUID returned here is required when creating subscriptions (create_subscription), BNPL plans (create_bnpl), or payouts (create_payout) for a known customer. Store it in your own database.
Sandbox base URL is https://api.test.bictorys.com — the production URL is https://api.bictorys.com.
